Class FishCatchTrigger

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.trigger.FishCatchTrigger
All Implemented Interfaces:
PassiveTrigger
public final class FishCatchTrigger extends Object implements PassiveTrigger
Trigger token fired when a player catches a Sylphian fish (state CAUGHT_FISH).

Passives that multiply XP write their factors into this token via multiplyXp(double). After all passives have fired, the skill reads xpMultiplier() to compute the final XP award.

Supports debug tracing: passives call record(String, String, boolean) after contributing, and the skill reads traceEntries() to send the log to any watcher.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishCatchTrigger

      public FishCatchTrigger(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack caught, org.bukkit.Location location)
      Parameters:
      caught - the item stack that was caught
      location - the location of the caught item entity

  • Method Details

    • caught

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack caught()
      Returns:
      the item stack that was caught

    • location

      public org.bukkit.Location location()
      Returns:
      the location of the catch

    • multiplyXp

      public void multiplyXp(double factor)
      Multiplies the accumulated XP multiplier by the given factor.
      Parameters:
      factor - the multiplier to apply, e.g. 1.5 for +50% XP

    • xpMultiplier

      public double xpMultiplier()
      Returns the combined XP multiplier accumulated from all passives. Starts at 1.0; each call to multiplyXp(double) compounds it.
      Returns:
      the final XP multiplier to apply to the base XP value

    • record

      public void record(String source, String description, boolean active)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing. No-op by default; override in concrete trigger classes that support tracing.
      Specified by:
      record in interface PassiveTrigger
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did
      active - true if the contribution came from an active ability

    • traceEntries

      public List<TraceEntry> traceEntries()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added. Returns an empty list by default.
      Specified by:
      traceEntries in interface PassiveTrigger
      Returns:
      recorded contributions, or an empty list if tracing is not supported
